mission.title: radius: Adding AWS region selection to rad init
mission.description:
# Description

* Adding AWS region selection to rad init
  - Region selection leverages EC2.DescribeRegions API

![image](https://github.com/project-radius/radius/assets/32342549/6954818c-e46f-4090-83aa-a451f47d8029)

## Issue reference

Fixes: radius-project/core-team#1192

## Checklist

Please make sure you've  completed the relevant tasks for this PR, out of the following list:

* [ ] Code compiles correctly
* [ ] Adds necessary unit tests for change
* [ ] Adds necessary E2E tests for change
* [ ] Unit tests passing
* [ ] Extended the documentation / Created issue for it

## Auto-generated summary

### <samp>🤖 Generated by Copilot at 3f50c4d</samp>

### Summary
:sparkles::wrench::white_check_mark:

This pull request adds support for AWS regions in the `radinit` command, using the EC2 service to list and select regions. It also updates some AWS-related dependencies and removes an unused one. The code and tests are refactored and improved accordingly.

> _`radinit` asks you_
> _to ch
